sources.adversarial_review: literature/Adversarial Referee Report on the Finite-Closed Capability-Boundary Scope Theorem deep-research-report.md

purpose: Audit the repaired capability-boundary taxonomy packet after T433, T435, and T436 against the 2026-07-02 adversarial review objections.

repair_checks.question: Is the killed universal theorem still withdrawn?
evidence: open-problems/finite-closed-capability-boundary-scope-theorem.md
technical-reports/capability-boundary-mode-taxonomy-REFERENCE.md
taxonomy standing is internal organizing map, not promoted theorem
T433/T435/T436 each state no claim promotion
repair_checks.residual_risk: Any hard-theorem paper or claim-ledger movement still pauses for Joe.

repair_checks.question: Is prior art treated as verified local context rather than novelty support?
evidence: papers/drafts/prior-art-verification-and-divergent-direction-pass-2026-07-02.md
local prior-art draft records E1, E2, E3, masking, constructor-theory, and reference-frame homes
novelty verdict is LOW; packaging survives only as synthesis/perspective
repair_checks.residual_risk: No new web fetch was performed in T437; public use would need a separate citation-quality review and Joe authorization.

repair_checks.question: Does the classical C-fragment have a constructive finite-product repair?
evidence: T433 verdict CLASSICAL_DECLARABILITY_PROOF_CERTIFIED
A1 contains identity/full-code readout, so every total datum factors by lookup
mixed finite sweep has zero single-instance physical candidates relative to A1
repair_checks.residual_risk: Classical finite product codes only; this is not a universal no-go and does not touch quantum E3.

repair_checks.question: Is the quantum E3 side stated with A-class and reference-resource policy fixed?
evidence: T435 fixes A1 symmetry-respecting menus and A2 reference-resource admission
A1 phase pair is E3-style relative to A1 without reference
same datum becomes E0-declared relative to A2 with reference resource
repair_checks.residual_risk: Finite admission gate only; not a WAY theorem, not a quantum physics claim, and not a GU/TaF adapter.

repair_checks.question: Does the repaired packet block overreading T435 as absolute E3?
evidence: T436 classifies the T435 phase pair as A1-relative and A2-declared
absolute-after-resource output appears only on a synthetic exact no-go control
large cost, missing A2 audit, post-hoc policies, and hidden oracles are rejected
repair_checks.residual_risk: A real absolute E3 artifact still requires an independently typed exact no-go witness that survives A2 resource-lift audit.

promotion_checks.question: Can the repaired taxonomy be treated as a public hard-theorem paper?
evidence: prior-art verification says broad novelty is LOW
adversarial review says not publishable as a hard-theorem paper as originally framed
current repairs are recorded-tier internal support, not external posture movement
promotion_checks.residual_risk: A synthesis/perspective note or classical theorem path is a separate Joe decision; T437 does not authorize publication.

promotion_checks.question: Has a real absolute E3/WAY-style witness been supplied?
evidence: T436 has only a synthetic exact no-go calibration control
T435 is A1-relative and lifted to E0 by A2 reference admission
T421 remains a logged disanalogy, not a revived adapter
promotion_checks.residual_risk: Future E3 work must bring an independently typed exact no-go witness; do not use sibling-repo claims as support.

promotion_checks.question: Does the taxonomy repair decide the D2 computational-arrow lane?
evidence: T419 is REDESIGN
T420 blocks finite public-cycle anti-relabel evidence
remaining D2 route needs family-level period hardness or a different regime
promotion_checks.residual_risk: D2 redesign/abandon is separate from this taxonomy hostile-review gate.

overall_verdict.reading: The repaired taxonomy clears the repo-local hostile-review gate for internal use as an organizing map: the universal no-go remains withdrawn, prior art is treated as low-novelty context, the classical C-fragment has a constructive proof certificate, and the quantum E3 side is A-class/resource-lift guarded. Promotion, public-paper posture, real absolute E3, D2 redesign, and GU/TaF adapter work remain blocked or separately gated.

recommended_next: Use the taxonomy internally as a mode classifier, not as a promoted claim.
Future E3 work needs a real exact no-go witness beyond T436 synthetic calibration.
Future D2 work needs family-level period-hardness redesign or explicit abandonment.
Any public synthesis/classical-theorem path remains a Joe decision.
honest_ceiling: Hostile-review gate only. T437 supports internal use of the repaired taxonomy as an organizing map; it does not revive the universal no-go theorem, prove WAY, promote E3, choose D2 redesign/abandon, revive T421, update claims, authorize public-posture movement; no claim promotion.
